title: Looking for flow setup and maintenance
excerpt:
I had someone helping my team in the company set up our Monday flows, dashboards, etc. but “unfortunately” they got promoted and now I don’t have them. :slight_smile: 
Essentially I need someone for I’m guessing about 6 …

posts.author: OnlineInference (Dave Davies)
posts.cookedHtml:
I had someone helping my team in the company set up our Monday flows, dashboards, etc. but “unfortunately” they got promoted and now I don’t have them.

Essentially I need someone for I’m guessing about 6 to 8 hours/wk ongoing to set up new flows for us with automations and notifications. Additionally, you’ll be responsible to maintaining existing flows, as well as interviewing folks to walk through their processes and set them up.

A sample would be social media. A rough (very) flow might be:

Intake form with optional notifications
Approved by SMM (notification to submitter)
Social post created (sent to OP for proofing if requested)
Added to calendar (sent to OP if requested)
Posted (sent to OP if requested and slack channel)
Archived

This is a pretty basic example, but I think it passes along the idea.

I’d also like someone familiar with dashboards, to give up one-glance update locations.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @OnlineInference

Welcome to the monday .com community!

Workflow orchestration helps your business to streamline and optimize operations. You can easily shape your business’ workflow with a no-code platform like monday .com. Automation plays a crucial role in restructuring complex workflows. It improves efficiency by eradicating human errors and helps you ensure that workflows of any type (project, social media, process) progress seamlessly as per your enterprise’s rules and triggers.

If you’re seeking an easier way to build new workflows or maintain existing ones, hiring experts from a recognized monday.com consulting company is the right choice. With deep expertise in a range of templates, they can build personalized flows and modify existing ones to cater to diverse business requirements.
